name: Kaido (ST04-003) (Alternate Art)
effect_text: [On Play] DON!! -5 (You may return the specified number of DON!! cards from your field to your DON!! deck.): K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 6 or less.This Character gains [Rush] during this turn.(This card can attack on the turn in which it is played.)
